# AI Research Verification Agent Audit Report

**Auditor Role:** AI Verification Agent  
**Audit Target:** validation of research generated by the previous agent  
**Rule:** Treat every field as potentially incorrect until proven otherwise by official documentation.

---

## 1. Field-by-Field Verification Audit Log

### 1. Application: HubSpot

*   **Field Name:** App Name
    *   **Research Agent Value:** HubSpot
    *   **Verified Value:** HubSpot
    *   **Status:** Correct
    *   **Reason:** Matches official HubSpot developer and product branding.
    *   **Official Documentation URL:** https://developers.hubspot.com/docs/api/overview

*   **Field Name:** Category
    *   **Research Agent Value:** CRM and Sales
    *   **Verified Value:** CRM and Sales
    *   **Status:** Correct
    *   **Reason:** HubSpot is officially positioned as a customer relationship management (CRM) suite.
    *   **Official Documentation URL:** https://www.hubspot.com/products/crm

*   **Field Name:** One-line Description
    *   **Research Agent Value:** Software application in the CRM and Sales category.
    *   **Verified Value:** Inbound marketing CRM offering developer portals for contacts and pipelines.
    *   **Status:** Incorrect
    *   **Reason:** The research agent returned a generic category fallback template instead of a functional description.
    *   **Official Documentation URL:** https://developers.hubspot.com/docs/api/overview

*   **Field Name:** Authentication Methods
    *   **Research Agent Value:** ["OAuth2", "API key", "Token"]
    *   **Verified Value:** ["OAuth2", "Token"]
    *   **Status:** Partially Correct
    *   **Reason:** API Keys were deprecated by HubSpot in November 2022. Integrations must use OAuth2 or Private App Access Tokens.
    *   **Official Documentation URL:** https://developers.hubspot.com/docs/api/overview

*   **Field Name:** Self Serve vs Gated
    *   **Research Agent Value:** paid-plan-gated
    *   **Verified Value:** self-serve-free
    *   **Status:** Incorrect
    *   **Reason:** HubSpot allows developers to sign up for free developer accounts and sandbox environments to test API functionality without a paid subscription.
    *   **Official Documentation URL:** https://developers.hubspot.com/docs/api/overview

*   **Field Name:** API Surface
    *   **Research Agent Value:** REST
    *   **Verified Value:** REST
    *   **Status:** Correct
    *   **Reason:** The main API surface is public REST endpoints (v3 API).
    *   **Official Documentation URL:** https://developers.hubspot.com/docs/api/overview

*   **Field Name:** Existing MCP Availability
    *   **Research Agent Value:** true
    *   **Verified Value:** true
    *   **Status:** Correct
    *   **Reason:** Verified through active toolkits inside the Composio registry.
    *   **Official Documentation URL:** https://composio.dev/app/hubspot

*   **Field Name:** Buildability Verdict
    *   **Research Agent Value:** buildable-with-friction
    *   **Verified Value:** ready-today
    *   **Status:** Incorrect
    *   **Reason:** Self-serve developer credentials (private app tokens) are immediately generated in a free developer workspace without billing approvals.
    *   **Official Documentation URL:** https://developers.hubspot.com/docs/api/overview

*   **Field Name:** Main Blocker
    *   **Research Agent Value:** Requires paid subscription plan
    *   **Verified Value:** None
    *   **Status:** Incorrect
    *   **Reason:** Free sandbox account developer credentials face no gating barriers.
    *   **Official Documentation URL:** https://developers.hubspot.com/docs/api/overview

*   **Field Name:** Evidence URL
    *   **Research Agent Value:** https://www.hubspot.com/
    *   **Verified Value:** https://developers.hubspot.com/docs/api/overview
    *   **Status:** Incorrect
    *   **Reason:** The research agent linked to the marketing homepage instead of the official API developer overview page.
    *   **Official Documentation URL:** https://developers.hubspot.com/docs/api/overview

### 2. Application: Attio

*   **Field Name:** App Name
    *   **Research Agent Value:** Attio
    *   **Verified Value:** Attio
    *   **Status:** Correct
    *   **Reason:** Matches official vendor branding.
    *   **Official Documentation URL:** https://developers.attio.com/reference

*   **Field Name:** Category
    *   **Research Agent Value:** CRM and Sales
    *   **Verified Value:** CRM and Sales
    *   **Status:** Correct
    *   **Reason:** Attio is positioned as a developer-friendly customizable CRM.
    *   **Official Documentation URL:** https://attio.com/

*   **Field Name:** One-line Description
    *   **Research Agent Value:** Software application in the CRM and Sales category.
    *   **Verified Value:** Modern data-driven CRM offering flexible developer key generation.
    *   **Status:** Incorrect
    *   **Reason:** The research agent fallback generic description template was replaced with a custom operational description.
    *   **Official Documentation URL:** https://developers.attio.com/reference

*   **Field Name:** Authentication Methods
    *   **Research Agent Value:** ["API key", "OAuth2"]
    *   **Verified Value:** ["API key", "OAuth2"]
    *   **Status:** Correct
    *   **Reason:** Supports personal API keys generated inside workspace settings and OAuth2.
    *   **Official Documentation URL:** https://developers.attio.com/reference

*   **Field Name:** Self Serve vs Gated
    *   **Research Agent Value:** self-serve-free
    *   **Verified Value:** self-serve-free
    *   **Status:** Correct
    *   **Reason:** Attio offers a free-tier plan (up to 3 users) with API key configuration enabled out-of-the-box.
    *   **Official Documentation URL:** https://developers.attio.com/reference

*   **Field Name:** API Surface
    *   **Research Agent Value:** REST
    *   **Verified Value:** REST
    *   **Status:** Correct
    *   **Reason:** Documented HTTP requests.
    *   **Official Documentation URL:** https://developers.attio.com/reference

*   **Field Name:** Existing MCP Availability
    *   **Research Agent Value:** true
    *   **Verified Value:** true
    *   **Status:** Correct
    *   **Reason:** Verified through active toolkits inside the Composio registry.
    *   **Official Documentation URL:** https://composio.dev/app/attio

*   **Field Name:** Buildability Verdict
    *   **Research Agent Value:** ready-today
    *   **Verified Value:** ready-today
    *   **Status:** Correct
    *   **Reason:** Anyone can sign up for free and generate active API credentials immediately.
    *   **Official Documentation URL:** https://developers.attio.com/reference

*   **Field Name:** Main Blocker
    *   **Research Agent Value:** None
    *   **Verified Value:** None
    *   **Status:** Correct
    *   **Reason:** No blockers identified.
    *   **Official Documentation URL:** https://developers.attio.com/reference

*   **Field Name:** Evidence URL
    *   **Research Agent Value:** https://google.com
    *   **Verified Value:** https://developers.attio.com/reference
    *   **Status:** Incorrect
    *   **Reason:** Research agent defaulted to google.com instead of linking to the developer reference portal.
    *   **Official Documentation URL:** https://developers.attio.com/reference

### 3. Application: Paygent Connect

*   **Field Name:** App Name
    *   **Research Agent Value:** Paygent Connect
    *   **Verified Value:** Paygent Connect
    *   **Status:** Correct
    *   **Reason:** Matches official vendor branding.
    *   **Official Documentation URL:** https://paygent.com

*   **Field Name:** Category
    *   **Research Agent Value:** Finance and Fintech
    *   **Verified Value:** Finance and Fintech
    *   **Status:** Correct
    *   **Reason:** Paygent Connect is a commercial payment gateway service.
    *   **Official Documentation URL:** https://paygent.com

*   **Field Name:** One-line Description
    *   **Research Agent Value:** Software application in the Finance and Fintech category.
    *   **Verified Value:** Credit gateway requiring custom corporate client certificates.
    *   **Status:** Incorrect
    *   **Reason:** Replaced category-hint template with verified operational characteristics.
    *   **Official Documentation URL:** https://paygent.com

*   **Field Name:** Authentication Methods
    *   **Research Agent Value:** ["Basic", "Other"]
    *   **Verified Value:** ["Basic", "Other"]
    *   **Status:** Correct
    *   **Reason:** Integrations utilize SSL client certificates coupled with basic credentials.
    *   **Official Documentation URL:** https://paygent.com

*   **Field Name:** Self Serve vs Gated
    *   **Research Agent Value:** contact-sales
    *   **Verified Value:** contact-sales
    *   **Status:** Correct
    *   **Reason:** Japanese commercial payment gateway requiring strict business registration, corporate screening, and whitelisting. No self-serve registration exists.
    *   **Official Documentation URL:** https://paygent.com

*   **Field Name:** API Surface
    *   **Research Agent Value:** REST
    *   **Verified Value:** REST
    *   **Status:** Correct
    *   **Reason:** Serves REST/HTTPS POST formats.
    *   **Official Documentation URL:** https://paygent.com

*   **Field Name:** Existing MCP Availability
    *   **Research Agent Value:** false
    *   **Verified Value:** false
    *   **Status:** Correct
    *   **Reason:** No Composio toolkit exists in the directory.
    *   **Official Documentation URL:** https://composio.dev

*   **Field Name:** Buildability Verdict
    *   **Research Agent Value:** blocked
    *   **Verified Value:** blocked
    *   **Status:** Correct
    *   **Reason:** Gated by geography, security approvals, and corporate partner restrictions.
    *   **Official Documentation URL:** https://paygent.com

*   **Field Name:** Main Blocker
    *   **Research Agent Value:** Requires sales contact or administrative approval
    *   **Verified Value:** Requires sales contact or administrative approval
    *   **Status:** Correct
    *   **Reason:** No public sign-ups are allowed without formal corporate onboarding.
    *   **Official Documentation URL:** https://paygent.com

*   **Field Name:** Evidence URL
    *   **Research Agent Value:** https://paygent
    *   **Verified Value:** https://paygent.com
    *   **Status:** Incorrect
    *   **Reason:** Research agent outputted an incomplete domain string instead of the fully qualified domain name.
    *   **Official Documentation URL:** https://paygent.com
